pages.full_text:
off in the van left at Garda, [?Affri], back road to N. __Verona__. Difficult to find way. Van GPS slow. We come up a road marked ~~metres~~ 2.1m. The van is 2m. So we had
5cm spare
The van only just scrapes thro. I was anxious 3 roads before the end. Simon only got anxious at the very end. Ivy.
__Camping Castel San Pietro__ * * * * Incredibly hot. We have a shower, eat + [?fix] Simon joins queue for a tent pitch. We have to leave the van on the road. Next to motor cyclists who smoke out on the terraces.
     It's part of a [?B] castle with lots of terraces, higgledy piggledy.
                               Verona Opera
pages.notes: The word after 'Garda,' looks like 'Affri' but could be an abbreviation or place name — uncertain. The crossed-out word before '2.1m' reads as 'metres' with a strikethrough. A circled letter/number before 'castle' looks like 'B' or '13' — could be a circled 'B' annotation. The word after 'eat +' appears struck through and rewritten; reads as '[?fix]' with Simon written after. Photo at bottom is of the Verona Arena (Roman amphitheatre) at night, captioned 'Verona Opera' in the diary.

pages.full_text:
The motor cyclists turn out to be really nice. we give them tea + rock cakes on the terrace. Then we set off down the hill, after a second shower. We visit the cathedral + see Romanesque carvings, a few. We sit outside + watch very
[?Stage] for Carmen
[photo]
posh people dressed to the Nines, going to the opera. Wonderful style + clothes. One very fat lady is dressed in a plain white linen dress + you can see all her fat quivering as she moves. A good supper. Cold veg soup. Croutons with little dollops of cream [?cheese]! Then reglets cooked in myrtle! Delicious but rich.
pages.notes: The text 'Stage for Carmen' appears above the photo and acts as a caption or label for the opera stage set photograph. The word before 'for Carmen' is partially obscured by the photo placement and looks like 'Stage' or '[?Stage]'. The last word of the page 'cheese' after 'cream' is partially obscured; the word 'reglets' may be a type of French dish (rigolets or similar) — transcribed as written. The city Verona is implied throughout by context (Camping Castel San Pietro, Verona Opera, cathedral visit, and opera references) but not explicitly named again on this page.
